name: mtix
description: AI-native micro issue manager for code-generating LLMs. Hierarchical task decomposition with context chains, multi-agent orchestration, and safety-critical standards.

interface.shortDescription: AI-native micro issue manager for LLM agents
interface.longDescription: Hierarchical task decomposition with dot-notation context chains. Multiple LLM agents decompose, claim, and execute work concurrently. The hierarchy IS the briefing — each level adds context that flows down to the executing agent.
defaultPrompt: Use mtix to list ready tasks and claim one for execution.
Use mtix to decompose this task into subtasks with context chains.
